<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List messages"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v1/messages"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Retrieve a paginated list of messages with optional filters.
Results are ordered by `createdAt` descending (most recent first).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
